# TreePine

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TreePine;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TreePine { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
tree, pine, forest, park, nature

nature, sustainability
